title: US-Iran Tensions Build Over Hormuz As Peace Talks Stall
summary_full: US forces boarded a "sanctioned stateless vessel" transporting oil from Iran in the Indian Ocean.
summary_public: US forces boarded a "sanctioned stateless vessel" transporting oil from Iran in the Indian Ocean.
